title: juncus bulbosus f. pygmaeus
intro: Juncus bulbosus f. pygmaeus, also known as dwarf soft rush, is a variant of the Juncus bulbosus plant, which belongs to the family Juncaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Juncus bulbosus f. pygmaeus include treating urinary tract issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting digestive health. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
